violations.description: REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceilings noted in need of some cleaning and repairs.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Refigerator and walkin cooler noted with no thermometer inside. .
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): A couple filters in hood noted in need of cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cell phone noted stored on prep table; to be stored in a secluded area away from the possibility of contamination of food contact surfaces.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Raw meat noted stored an inch off floor in area subject to moisture inside walkin cooler.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Walkin cooler noted with no thermometer.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): (Shared) exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and ceiling areas in kitchen need cleaning and repairs.
